content.thinking: The user is asking about the latest US news. I don't have web search capabilities, and none of my available tools are relevant to news. I should let the user know.

content.text:
I appreciate you reaching out! Unfortunately, I **don't have the ability to browse the web or access real-time news feeds**, so I'm unable to provide the latest US news updates. For the most current and accurate news, I'd recommend checking these reliable sources:

- 📰 **AP News** – [apnews.com](https://apnews.com)
- 📺 **BBC News US** – [bbc.com/news/us-canada](https://www.bbc.com/news/us-canada)
- 🗞️ **Reuters** – [reuters.com](https://www.reuters.com)
- 📡 **NPR News** – [npr.org](https://www.npr.org)
- 🌐 **Google News** – [news.google.com](https://news.google.com)

---

However, what I **can** help you with is **travel-related assistance**! 🌍✈️ I can:

- 📍 Detect your **current location**
- 🌤️ Check the **weather** in your city
- 🍽️ Recommend **restaurants**
- 🎯 Suggest fun **activities**
- 🎉 Find local **events**
- 📋 Create a full **travel summary** for your day!

Would you like me to help you with any of these? Just say the word! 😊
